about.title: A Strategic Collective of Elite Advisors

narrative.paragraph1: FAC is not merely a consultancy—it is a strategic collective led by Mark Lin, bringing together legal, compliance, FinTech, and government relations elites. Our collective energy emerges from the fusion of Mark's 40-year global perspective with team members' deep local execution capabilities.
narrative.paragraph2: Each team member embodies the same 'engineer logic' and 'marathon resilience' that define our founder. We approach every client challenge with the precision of engineers and the endurance of marathoners—methodically breaking down complex Greater China market entry into achievable milestones.
narrative.paragraph3: For Middle Eastern sovereign funds and Southeast Asian family offices, our collective offers something unique: institutional-grade execution backed by elite networks spanning Hong Kong regulatory bodies, Beijing policy circles, and the Hong Kong Science Park innovation ecosystem.
